basic_details.job_title: Telangana Endowment Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 190 Posts
basic_details.post_name: Executive Officer - Grade-I, Grade-II, and Grade-III
basic_details.department: Office of the Commissioner of Endowments Department, Hyderabad (under Revenue Department, Govt. of Telangana)
basic_details.application_mode: To be announced (expected Online - as per Telangana Government norms)
basic_details.short_information: Government of Telangana (Endowments Department) has officially released a recruitment notification for the creation of 190 Executive Officer posts (Grade-I, Grade-II, and Grade-III) under the administrative control of the Revenue Department. This is a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs in Telangana. As per G.O.Ms.No.42 dated 30 April 2026, the posts have been sanctioned and will be filled through Direct Recruitment. Detailed district-wise vacancies are provided in the annexure.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 30 April 2026 Starting Date for Apply: Updated Soon Last Date to Apply: Updated Soon

selection_process: Direct Recruitment Process Written Examination / Interview (Expected) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Visit the official Telangana Government recruitment portal (to be announced)
Submit the application and save a copy

faq.question: Q1. What is Telangana Endowment Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Telangana Endowment Recruitment 2026 is a government job notification released by the Endowments Department for 190 Executive Officer posts (Grade I, II, and III). These positions will be filled through a direct recruitment process under the Revenue Department.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Telangana Endowment Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 190 vacancies have been sanctioned for Executive Officer posts. These include 41 posts for Grade-I, 62 posts for Grade-II, and 87 posts for Grade-III across various zones and districts in Telangana.

faq.question: Q3. What are the post names in Telangana Endowment Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes three categories of posts: Executive Officer Grade-I, Executive Officer Grade-II, and Executive Officer Grade-III. These posts are distributed across different temples and endowment institutions in Telangana.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for Telangana Endowment Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The detailed educational qualification has not yet been released. Candidates are advised to wait for the official detailed notification, which will specify the required qualifications for each grade of Executive Officer posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Telangana Endowment Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not mentioned in the current government order. The complete age criteria, including relaxation for reserved categories, will be announced in the official recruitment notification.
